body.title: cc_queue.py + granny shim: rename 'Test plan' → 'Completion criteria' section label
body.result: All 4 stale 'Test plan' strings renamed; 61/61 tests pass; no more spurious warning on correctly-formatted tickets
body.description:
devices/granny/device.py was updated to check for 'Completion criteria' but three callers still reference the old 'Test plan' label: cc_queue.py _REQUIRED_DESCRIPTION_SECTIONS, devices/granny/shim.py self-test fixture, tests/test_granny_shim.py intake fixture. Results: spurious WARNING on every correctly-formatted ticket filed via cc_queue.py add, and a misleading fixture in granny shim tests.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (line 1117), devices/granny/shim.py (line 111), tests/test_granny_shim.py (lines 34, 113)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: rename the 4 stale string occurrences across 3 files. OUT: scraps device fixtures, igor test fixtures (separate tickets if needed).
**Completion criteria:** (1) cc_queue.py add no longer emits 'Test plan' warning for correctly-formatted tickets. (2) All granny tests pass. (3) No other 'Test plan' references remain in devices/granny/ or lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py.
